headline: Entergy (ETR) Price Target Raised Following Q1 Earnings Beat
summary: Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) is included among the 12 Best Electric Utility Stocks to Buy for the Data Center Surge. Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) delivers electricity and gas services to 3 million utility customers in Arkansas, Louisiana, Mississippi, and Texas. On May 5, Citi bumped up its price target on Entergy Corporation (NYSE:ETR) from $116 to $121, […]
